# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup
Resources:
  MySQSQueue:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QueueName
      VisibilityTimeoutSeconds: 300
      MessageRetentionSeconds: 86400
      RedrivePolicy:
        MaxReceiveCount: 5
        DeadLetterQueue:
          QueueName: !Ref DeadLetterQueue
          MaxReceiveCount: 10

  MyDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-dead-letter-queue

  MySNSTopic:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref SnsTopicName

  MySQSPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Policy'
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub ${Aws::StackName}-sqs-policy
      Path: /
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
            Resource: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn

  MyTopicSubscription:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::TopicSubscription'
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref MySNSTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Url

Parameters:
  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Description: The name of the SQS queue
  DeadLetterQueueName:
    Type: String
    Description: The name of the dead letter SQS queue (defaults to stack name suffixed with -dead-letter-queue)
  SnsTopicName:
    Type: String
    Description: The name of the SNS topic
